title: Create Construct
description: A modpack designed around create and tinkers construct. Working together to make cool things happen.
body: # Hello! Welcome to Create Construct , a place for creation and community! ![The alchemists house](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b9a123d1a91cd7917b2adc814004247624a6589.png) ## About the pack The core mods of Create Construct are of course **Create** (accompanied by many of its add-ons) and **Tinkers Construct**. With these two mods being meshed together through melting and mixing hopefully you'll find fun times to be had. With a complete food overhaul, a work in progress currency system, an extensive class and skill tree, hyper realistic guns, and some spice of life tweaks, the pack offers a lot to different play styles. ## Community **Want to learn more about the pack, follow its development, or just hangout with likeminded people?** \ You can do all of this on the [discord server](https://discord.gg/dWvyV5ghPjx), its a little small right now but with your help we can grow a strong community! To join just click [here](https://discord.gg/dWvyV5ghPjx) or on the "Join Discord server" button on the sidebar. ![Create Category on the discord server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/350ce017edd4a0fe1d3a6a8071b1e16add0ea03c.png) \ If you would like to host your own servers a server ready zip is avalible in the discord server.
